---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there alternative approaches you have considered?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references.
